news.headline: FDA reports update on illnesses linked to Diamond Shruumz-brand chocolate bars and cones. #FoodSafety.
news.summary: In Silver Spring, Maryland on June 28, 2024, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration issued an overview of recent developments: The FDA has revised its warning about illnesses linked to consuming Diamond Shruumz-brand Chocolate Bars, Cones.

The report is slated for release before the market opens on Thursday, August 1, 2024. City Office's leadership will conduct a...

news.headline: Trinity Capital Inc. (NASDAQ: TRIN) adjusts conversion rate of 6.00% Convertible Notes due 2025.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Trinity Capital Inc. (NASDAQ: TRIN) revealed an alteration in the conversion rate of its 6.00% Convertible Notes due 2025. Trinity, a prominent financial solutions provider for growing firms, made this announcement.

news.headline: Nanalysis Scientific Corp appoints new director after successful AGM with all resolutions approved. (Character count: 104)
news.summary: In Calgary, AB on June 28, 2024, Nanalysis Scientific Corp. has announced that all proposed resolutions were successfully approved at their recent Annual General and Special Meeting of shareholders on June 26. The company, listed on TSXV as NSCI, OTCQX as NSCIF, and FRA as 1N1, expressed satisfaction with the outcome of the meeting.

news.headline: Jiuzi Holdings Inc. to undergo 1-for-13 reverse share split of its outstanding ordinary shares on July 3, 2024 in China.
news.summary: In Hangzhou, China, on June 28, 2024, Jiuzi Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: JZXN) disclosed plans for a reverse share split of its ordinary shares. The company, a prominent new energy vehicle (NEV) dealership group operating as "Jiuzi" in China, is set to implement a 1-for-13 reverse share split of its outstanding ordinary shares with a par value of $0.00015 per share. This move is scheduled to take effect on or near the commencement of trading on July 3, 2024.

news.headline: Lucid Group, Inc (NASDAQ: LCID) and Gravity, Inc resolved a trademark dispute over the use of "Lucid".
news.summary: In an announcement made on June 28, 2024, Lucid Group, Inc., known for its cutting-edge electric vehicles, disclosed a partnership with Gravity, Inc., a U.S. company specializing in high-speed EV charging technology. This agreement, recorded under NASDAQ as LCID, marks a significant milestone for both companies. This collaboration is aimed at utilizing Lucid's expertise in electric vehicles in conjunction with Gravity's prowess in fast EV charging solutions. This strategic arrangement signifies a key development in the electric vehicle industry, underlining the growing importance of EV infrastructure and technology integration.

news.headline: Tonix Pharmaceuticals closed $4 million public offering, selling 2,833,900 shares at $0.57 per share & pre-funded warrants for $0.569 each.
news.summary: Chatham, New Jersey - On June 28, 2024, Tonix Pharmaceuticals Holding Corp. (Nasdaq: TNXP) revealed the completion of its recent public offering. The company successfully sold 2,833,900 shares of common stock and pre-funded warrants allowing the purchase of 4,228,158 common stock shares. This public offering was priced at $0.57 per common stock share and $0.569 per pre-funded warrant. The warrants hold an exercise price of $0.001 per share, becoming exercisable upon receipt. Tonix, a fully-integrated biopharmaceutical firm, made this announcement regarding its recent financial activities.

news.headline: GRI Bio closes $4.0M public offering, selling 2,185,793 shares of common stock at $1.83 per share, with Series warrants.
news.summary: GRI Bio, Inc., a biotechnology company, has closed a public offering of 2,185,793 shares of common stock, Series C-1 warrants to purchase up to 2,185,793 shares, and Series C-2 warrants to purchase up to 2,185,793 shares, at a price of $1.83 per share. The Series Warrants have an exercise price of $1.83 per share and expire on specific dates - the C-1 warrants expire on the five-year anniversary of the initial exercise date, while the C-2 warrants expire on the eighteen-month anniversary. The company is focused on developing NKT cell modulators for treating inflammatory, fibrotic, and autoimmune diseases.

news.headline: SAI.TECH partners with Al-Farabi Kazakh National University to boost tech education and AI in Kazakhstan.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, SAI.TECH Global Corporation (NASDAQ: SAI, SAITW) disclosed the completion of a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Al-Farabi Kazakh National University in Kazakhstan. The pact is designed to enhance educational and research efforts within the region.

news.headline: Wintrust Financial Corp (WTFC) to release Q2 & year-to-date 2024 earnings on July 17, 2024, with call on July 18 at 10am.
news.summary: Wintrust Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: WTFC) based in Rosemont, Illinois, disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter and year-to-date 2024 on July 17, 2024, post-market closure. The company is scheduled to conduct a conference call the following day, July 18, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. (Central Daylight Time). This update was shared on June 28, 2024.

news.headline: Supreme Court decision restricts agency power, posing threat to regulations on healthcare, safety, and environment, since 1984.
news.summary: In 1984, a significant ruling established a precedent for courts to give deference to agencies' reasonable interpretations of unclear laws. This decision has had a profound impact on regulations related to various sectors including healthcare, safety, and environmental protection.

news.headline: American Overseas Group Limited reports net income of $2.5 million for the three months ended March 31, 2024, with a book value per weighted share at $824.41.
news.summary: In Hamilton, Bermuda on June 28, 2024, American Overseas Group Limited (BSX: AORE.BH) (Pink Sheets: AOREF.PK), known as AOG, announced a consolidated net income available to common shareholders of $2.5 million for the three months ending March 31, 2024. This translated to $53.13 per diluted share. In comparison, for the same period in 2023, the company reported a consolidated net income of $1.4 million, or $30.44 per diluted share. As of March 31, 2024, the book value per weighted share stood at $824.41, indicating growth from $798.21 per weighted share recorded on March 31, 2023.

news.headline: Sify Technologies Ltd. in India announced over-subscribed rights offering. (Nasdaq: Sify) #ICT #tech
news.summary: In Chennai, India on June 28, 2024, Sify Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: Sify), a prominent ICT Solutions and Services provider in India, revealed that their latest rights offering was oversubscribed. The company saw a strong response from investors, surpassing the expected demand.

news.headline: Inflation at over 3-year lows, 2.6% in May. Rate cuts imminent as market expects Fed will cut in September. Trump leads after presidential debate.
news.summary: In May, the Personal Consumption Expenditure price index, the Federal Reserve's key inflation measure, hit its lowest level since March 2021 at an annual rate of 2.6%, aligning with economist forecasts. This suggests that price pressures are moving closer to the Fed's 2% target, reinforcing expectations for interest rate reductions. Market predictions indicate that a rate cut may happen in September, followed by another later in the year, and potentially three more in the following year. Following the first presidential debate, there was a surge in Donald Trump's win probabilities to around 60% as President Joe Biden's performance was widely considered disappointing. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Kirby Corporation (KEX) sets Aug 1, 2024, at 6:00 am CDT for Q2 earnings release and 7:30 am CDT for earnings webcast.
news.summary: Kirby Corporation, listed on the NYSE as KEX, is set to reveal its financial results for the second quarter of 2024 on August 1, 2024, at 6:00 a.m. CDT. Following this announcement, there will be an earnings conference call webcast at 7:30 a.m. CDT on the same day. Investors and stakeholders can tune in to learn about the company's performance during this period.

news.headline: Dime Community Bancshares, Inc. completes subordinated notes offering.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the past week. The total number of new cases recorded was approximately 10,000, marking a 25% rise from the previous week. Additionally, the number of deaths related to the virus has also seen a surge, with 150 new fatalities reported. Health officials attribute this spike to the emergence of new variants and a decline in vaccination rates. As a result, authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety measures such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Supreme Court's reversal of 'Chevron' ruling reduces power of US regulators.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in five years. The economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, exceeding expectations. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant increase, with the main index rising by 3.5% in response to the positive economic indicators. This marks a promising trend towards recovery and growth in the country's economy.

news.headline: Lennox International (NYSE: LII) upgraded to Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) due to upward trend in earnings estimates.
news.summary: Lennox International (NYSE: LII) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), driven by an upward trend in earnings estimates. This change is based on the Zacks Consensus Estimate, which tracks EPS estimates from analysts. The Zacks rating system focuses on the impact of a company's changing earnings picture on stock prices, making it a useful tool for individual investors. The upgrade for Lennox reflects a positive earnings outlook that could boost its stock price. Earnings potential is identified as the most powerful force influencing stock prices. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Royal Vopak (OTC: VOPKY) upgraded to Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) due to upward trend in earnings estimates, impacting stock prices.
news.summary: Royal Vopak (OTC: VOPKY) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), indicating an upward trend in earnings estimates. This rating system tracks the Zacks Consensus Estimate for current and following years, reflecting a positive outlook on the company's earnings. This upgrade highlights the potential for a favorable impact on Royal Vopak's stock price. The Zacks rating system is considered useful for individual investors who may find it challenging to rely solely on subjective analyst ratings. This news implies a positive shift in the company's earnings picture and could influence stock price movements in the near term.

news.headline: RTX upgraded to Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) due to improved earnings estimates trend, impacting stock price positively.
news.summary: RTX (NYSE: RTX) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) based on an upward trend in earnings estimates. The Zacks rating system focuses on changes in a company's earnings picture, with the consensus EPS estimates for the current and upcoming years tracked by the system. This upgrade indicates a positive comment on RTX's earnings outlook, which could impact its stock price favorably. The Zacks rating system is valuable for individual investors, as it offers a more objective analysis compared to subjective ratings by Wall Street analysts. This news can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: DBS Group Holdings upgraded to Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) due to upward trend in earnings estimates; likely to impact stock price positively.
news.summary: DBS Group Holdings Ltd (OTC: DBSDY) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) due to an upward trend in earnings estimates. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for the current and following years, which is based on EPS estimates from sell-side analysts, is the sole determinant of the Zacks rating. This upgrade reflects optimism about DBS Group's earnings outlook, which could lead to increased buying pressure and a rise in its stock price. The Zacks rating system considers the changing earnings picture as one of the most powerful forces impacting stock prices and can help investors make informed decisions based on objective data rather than subjective factors. This article can be found in full on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Chart Industries (NYSE: GTLS) to provide its IPSMR technology to Argent LNG for a 20 MTPA facility in Port Fourchon, LA. Argent focuses on LNG services and environmental care. IPSMR enhances efficiency in liquefaction systems.
news.summary: Chart Industries, Inc. (NYSE: GTLS) has recently been awarded a contract by Argent LNG to supply its IPSMR technology for the construction of a 20 MTPA LNG facility in Port Fourchon, LA. Argent LNG, a Louisiana-based company specializing in LNG services, focuses on innovation and environmental sustainability to contribute to the future of U.S. energy exports. The IPSMR process technology by Chart Industries is known for improving efficiency and performance in liquefaction systems, enabling LNG facilities to streamline resource utilization and lower operational expenses. This modular solution underscores Chart Industries' commitment to providing cutting-edge technologies for the LNG industry.

news.headline: Bechtel wins contract for BART Silicon Valley Extension, continuing legacy with $xxx million deal.
news.summary: A company involved in the design and construction of BART since 1962 is still leaving its mark. In San Jose, California, on June 28, 2024, the Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority (VTA) announced that Bechtel Infrastructure Corporation has been chosen to oversee construction management services for the Bay Area. This decision signifies the continuation of a partnership that began over 60 years ago, with Bechtel bringing its expertise to manage projects in the region. The selection of Bechtel highlights the confidence placed in the company, emphasizing its role in shaping transportation infrastructure in the Bay Area.

news.headline: Cassava Sciences: Former science advisor indicted, charged with defrauding NIH. Hoau-Yan Wang connected to case.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on June 28, 2024, Cassava Sciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: SAVA) revealed that a federal grand jury has issued an indictment against Hoau-Yan Wang for purportedly defrauding the U.S. National Institutes of Health (NIH). Wang, a tenured medical professor at a public university’s medical school and a previous paid science consultant for Cassava Sciences, has been charged in the indictment.

news.headline: US asset manager CrossingBridge Advisors, LLC partners with Nordic debt manager NCI Advisory A/S; deal announced June 28, 2024.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Pleasantville, NY-based CrossingBridge Advisors, LLC revealed a significant collaboration with Denmark's top debt asset management company, NCI Advisory A/S. This partnership marks a pivotal move for CrossingBridge, signaling an alliance with a high-performing firm. David Sherman, CEO of CrossingBridge, expressed excitement regarding the newly formed strategic alliance with NCI Advisory.

news.headline: Lindsay Corp beats earning estimate with $1.41 EPS, Q3 revenue at $139M, down 15.4%Y/Y; backlog at $246.9M.
news.summary: Lindsay Corporation (NYSE: LNN) reported adjusted earnings per share of $1.41 for the third quarter of fiscal 2024, exceeding the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.25. However, this was an 8% decline from the previous year. With an income tax credit of 44 cents per share included, earnings per share for the quarter were $1.85. Revenues were $139 million, down 15.4% from the year-ago quarter and missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $152 million. The backlog as of May 31, 2024, stood at $246.9 million, a significant increase from $94.5 million in the previous year.Cost of operating revenues dropped by 16.7% to $93 million, while gross profit decreased by 12.8% to $46.5 million. The gross margin was 33.4%. Operating expenses were up 1.1% year over year to $26.6 million, resulting in an operating income of $20 million, down from $27 million in the prior year.In the Irrigation segment, revenues fell by 19% to approximately $115 million, with North America irrigation revenues decreasing by 9% to $68 million.

news.headline: Exro Technologies reported 2024 Annual General Meeting voting results in Calgary, AB. Stock symbols: TSX: EXRO, OTCQB: EXROF.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on June 28, 2024, Exro Technologies Inc. (TSX: EXRO) (OTCQB: EXROF) announced its position as a prominent clean-tech firm offering exclusive propulsion system technology for e-mobility and specialized battery control technology for stationary energy purposes.

news.headline: Apogee Enterprises, Inc. beat Q1 fiscal 2025 EPS estimates with $1.44 and revenue of $331.5 million, down 8.3% YoY.
news.summary: Apogee Enterprises, Inc. (NASDAQ: APOG) reported earnings per share of $1.44 in first-quarter fiscal 2025, exceeding the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.16. This marked a 37.1% increase from the previous year. However, the company's revenues for the quarter dropped 8.3% year over year to $331.5 million due to lower volume. Cost of sales decreased by 13.4% to $233 million, while gross profit rose by 6.3% to $99 million with an expanded gross margin of 29.8%. Operating income increased by 22.5% to $41 million, with selling, general, and administrative expenses decreasing by 2.9% to $57 million. In the Architectural Framing Systems segment, revenues declined by 18.9% to $133 million, with operating profit at $18.4 million compared to $19.9 million in the previous year. The lower volumes were partly offset by favorable material costs, mix, and productivity gains.

news.headline: Kellanova (NYSE: K) upgraded to Zacks Rank #2 with positive earnings outlook, impacting stock prices significantly.
news.summary: Kellanova (NYSE: K) has recently been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) due to an upward trend in earnings estimates. The Zacks rating system relies on EPS estimates from sell-side analysts, indicating a positive earnings outlook for Kellanova. This rating upgrade suggests potential buying pressure and a rise in stock price. The Zacks rating system emphasizes the impact of changing earnings pictures on stock prices, making it a valuable tool for individual investors compared to subjective analyst upgrades. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Sharpen launches Usable AI™ platform revolutionizing customer service in contact centers, JUNE 28, 2024.
news.summary: Indianapolis, the 28th of June in 2024 - Sharpen, a prominent provider of cloud contact center software, unveiled a groundbreaking development in the customer service sector by introducing their Usable AI™ platform. This innovative AI-based platform is poised to revolutionize contact centers by offering cutting-edge solutions to enhance customer interactions.

news.headline: Amazon Labor Union and Teamsters, with 1.3 million members, join forces to challenge Amazon, signaling escalation in battle.
news.summary: The partnership between the Amazon Labor Union and the Teamsters, a union with 1.3 million members, represents a significant development in their efforts to confront the online retail giant.

news.headline: Abacus Life plans public offering, 10,000,000 shares of common stock, 30-day option for additional 1,500,000 shares.
news.summary: Orlando, Florida - June 13, 2024 - Abacus Life, Inc. (NASDAQ: ABL), a leader in alternative asset management focusing on longevity and actuarial technology, has revealed the launch of an underwritten public offering. The offering includes 10,000,000 shares of its common stock, with an additional option for the underwriters to purchase up to 1,500,000 more shares within 30 days at the public offering price. Abacus is the seller of all shares in the public offering.

news.headline: Arm Holdings plc will join the Nasdaq-100 Index on June 24, 2024, replacing Sirius XM Holdings Inc. in various indices.
news.summary: On June 13, 2024, Nasdaq announced that Arm Holdings plc (Nasdaq: ARM) will be included in multiple Nasdaq indices, including the Nasdaq-100 Index® (Nasdaq: NDX®), the Nasdaq-100 Equal Weighted™ Index (Nasdaq: NDXE™), the Nasdaq-100 Tech Sector™ Index (Nasdaq: NDXT™), the Nasdaq-100 Technology Sector Market-Cap Weighted™ Index (Nasdaq: NDXTMC™), and the Nasdaq-100 Technology Sector Adjusted Market-Cap Weighted™ Index (Nasdaq: NDXT10™). This change is set to take effect before the market opens on June 24, 2024. Arm Holdings plc will replace Sirius XM Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: SIRI) in the Nasdaq-100 Index® and the Nasdaq-100 Equal Weighted™ Index. Additionally, Sirius XM will be removed from the Nasdaq-100 Ex-Tech Sector™ Index (Nasdaq: NDXX™), the Nasdaq-100 ESG Index (Nasdaq: NDXESG™), the Nasdaq-100 Sustainable ESG Select Index (Nasdaq: NDXSES™), and the Nasdaq-100 Target 25 Index® (Nasdaq: NDXT25™) on the same date.

news.headline: Namib Minerals to go public by merging with Hennessy Capital Investment Corp. VI, expect to close deal in Q4 of 2024.
news.summary: On June 18, 2024, Namib Minerals, a prominent gold mining company in sub-Saharan Africa, announced a definitive agreement with Hennessy Capital Investment Corp. VI (Nasdaq: HCVI), a special purpose acquisition company listed on Nasdaq, for a business combination. The agreement, expected to be finalized in the fourth quarter of 2024, is contingent upon customary closing conditions and approvals. The merged entity, to be known as Namib Minerals once the transaction is completed, plans to list its common stock and warrants on Nasdaq under the ticker symbols "NAMM" and "NAMMW," pending listing application approval.

news.headline: April 2024 saw a 5.7% increase in monthly mortgage payments and a 0.1% rise in single-family home prices, impacting affordability.
news.summary: The affordability of housing in April 2024 was challenged due to a rise in mortgage rates and higher home prices. In comparison to March 2024, the average monthly mortgage payment surged by 5.7%. Additionally, the median price for single-family homes saw a slight uptick of 0.1%. These changes indicate the increasing financial burden on potential homebuyers looking to enter the market.

news.headline: Carnival Soars as Analysts Raise Price Targets after Q2 Earnings Beat. Stock up 2% to $18.18. Goldman Sachs hikes target to $23 for 29% rise.思Analyzed strong booking trends and pricing momentum. Rise in new-to-cruise passengers by 10% year-over-year in 2024. Booking demand not driven by pent-up demand but brand appeal and better yield management.
news.summary: Investment bank analysts raised Carnival Corp.'s year-ahead price targets following a strong earnings report and optimistic guidance. Shares rose 2% to $18.18, aiming for the seventh consecutive session of gains, the longest streak since December 2023. Goldman Sachs upgraded the price target from $22 to $23, suggesting a 29% upside. They highlighted a 10% year-over-year increase in new-to-cruise passengers in 2024. The company's improved yield management and brand consideration led to higher ticket prices, not just pent-up demand. Analysts believe consumer concerns after a slight Q1 decline in onboard spending should now ease.

news.headline: Cano Health successfully emerges from Chapter 11 with $290 million in annual cost reductions by 2024.
news.summary: Cano Health, Inc. has successfully completed a court-supervised restructuring process, resulting in a reduced debt burden and securing new financing for ongoing operations. The company aims to achieve annual cost reductions of $290 million by the end of 2024. The announcement was made on June 28, 2024 in Miami.

news.headline: States are introducing bills to regulate credit card swipe fees, posing challenges for banks and credit card companies.
news.summary: Financial institutions and credit card companies are facing challenges from emerging state legislation targeting swipe fees in various states across the country. This poses a significant concern for banks as they navigate the potential impact on their revenue streams from these new regulations. The industry is closely monitoring the situation as lawmakers debate the issue, with the outcome likely to have widespread ramifications for businesses and consumers alike.

news.headline: Red Cat (Nasdaq: RCAT) to join Russell Microcap® Index post-June 28, 2024, per addition list on May 24, 2024.
news.summary: In San Juan, Puerto Rico on June 24, 2024, Red Cat Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: RCAT), a drone technology company specializing in robotic hardware and software for military, government, and commercial sectors, revealed its inclusion in the Russell Microcap® Index. This will occur after the 2024 Russell US Indexes annual reconstitution, becoming effective after the closure of US equity markets on Friday, June 28, 2024. The decision was based on a preliminary list of additions released on Friday, May 24, 2024.

news.headline: Metro areas are building more houses than before due to factors like economic growth and population increase.
news.summary: Metropolitan areas are seeing a rise in housing production beyond their usual levels. The surge in construction is due to factors like economic expansion, population growth, and initiatives for urban development. This trend indicates a significant increase in housing projects within these regions, signaling potential opportunities for residents and investors.

news.headline: Michael Jackson passed away with a staggering $500 million debt, including $40 million owed to A.E.G. in 2009, now fully settled.
news.summary: In 2009, Jackson reportedly owed approximately $40 million to tour promoter A.E.G., as stated by his estate’s executors in a court document. However, these executors have confirmed that all the debts have now been cleared.

news.headline: Biden rejects calls to withdraw from 2024 race at Raleigh rally.
Earth Science Tech, Inc. reported annual revenue of over $11.9M for the year ended March 31, 2024. #ETST #businessnews
news.summary: In Miami, FL on June 28, 2024, Earth Science Tech, Inc. (OTC: ETST) disclosed its financial outcomes and key achievements for the year closing on March 31, 2024. ETST, a holding company concentrating on health and wellness, provided insights into its performance during this period.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency prices remain stagnant as U.S. inflation eases. Analysts puzzled over why Bitcoin and altcoins have not rallied despite this.
news.summary: Analysts and traders have long anticipated that a decrease in inflation would boost the crypto market's performance. Despite this expectation, cryptocurrency prices continue to remain low. Cointelegraph provides insights into the reasons behind this phenomenon.

news.headline: Hong Kong plans to boost DeFi presence, as DAO allocates $37M for Julian Assange's cause in Finance Redefined.
news.summary: The Hong Kong government is looking to strengthen its position in the financial technology (fintech) sector by focusing on decentralized finance (DeFi) and the metaverse. Despite facing obstacles in the current environment, the government is determined to achieve this goal. Hong Kong plans to invest significant resources and expertise into these areas to establish itself as a leading force in DeFi and the metaverse. This strategic move is part of the government's broader plan to maintain its dominance in the fintech industry.

news.headline: CFTC reported positions for the week ending June 25th.
Biden faces challenges in debate with Trump he requested.
